title: Quality Management (QM) Overview
learning_objectives: Understand the purpose of SAP Quality Management.
Learn the role of Quality Management in manufacturing.
Understand the quality lifecycle in SAP.
Identify the integration of QM with other SAP modules.
Learn commonly used SAP QM transaction codes.

introduction.title: What is SAP Quality Management?
introduction.content: SAP Quality Management (QM) is the module used to plan, execute, monitor and improve quality throughout the manufacturing process. It helps ensure that raw materials, semi-finished products and finished goods meet predefined quality standards before they are accepted or delivered to customers.

business_purpose.title: Why is SAP QM Used?
business_purpose.content: Quality Management ensures that products meet customer requirements and industry standards. It helps reduce defects, improve production quality, minimize rework, support regulatory compliance and increase customer satisfaction.

integration.purpose: Incoming material inspection after Goods Receipt.
Quality inspection during and after production.

business_example.title: Example
business_example.content: After production of stainless steel coils is completed, SAP automatically creates an Inspection Lot. The Quality team performs inspections, records test results, takes a Usage Decision and finally releases the material for warehouse storage or customer dispatch.

important_notes: Quality Management is integrated with every stage of production.
Inspection results directly affect inventory availability.
Proper Quality Management reduces customer complaints and production losses.
